# cookbook module
> Task-oriented OpenWrt guides: era-appropriate patterns, common AI mistakes, architecture overview, and cross-component howtos.
> **Total Context:** ~35804 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [map.md](./map.md): Structural map for cookbook that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~3921 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [bundled-reference.md](./bundled-reference.md): Complete monolithic reference for cookbook when a larger context window is available. (~36561 tokens, l4-monolith)

## Source Documents

- [architecture-overview.md](./chunked-reference/architecture-overview.md): Structural overview of OpenWrt component relationships, data flow, ACL/permission boundaries, and build-time vs runtime distinctions for AI tools and developers building on the platform. (~2981 tokens, l2-source)
- [common-ai-mistakes.md](./chunked-reference/common-ai-mistakes.md): Documents seven recurring categories of era-mismatched or API-incorrect patterns that AI tools produce when generating OpenWrt code, with WRONG/CORRECT pairs for each. (~2833 tokens, l2-source)
- [firstboot-uci-defaults-pattern.md](./chunked-reference/firstboot-uci-defaults-pattern.md): Correct pattern for first-boot and migration-time configuration changes in OpenWrt using /etc/uci-defaults, including sequencing, idempotency, helper usage, and the boundary between config mutation and service orchestration. (~2815 tokens, l2-source)
- [firstboot-wifi-policy.md](./chunked-reference/firstboot-wifi-policy.md): Focused guide to enabling or pre-seeding Wi-Fi on first boot in OpenWrt without turning asynchronous radio discovery into ad-hoc boot orchestration. (~1767 tokens, l2-source)
- [hotplug-handler-pattern.md](./chunked-reference/hotplug-handler-pattern.md): Shows how to write narrowly-scoped OpenWrt hotplug handlers that match explicit event contracts, publish minimal state, and hand off heavier work to the right control plane. (~2283 tokens, l2-source)
- [inter-component-communication-map.md](./chunked-reference/inter-component-communication-map.md): Practical guide to choosing the correct communication boundary in modern OpenWrt: UCI for persistent config, ubus for runtime state and method calls, rpcd for privileged backend APIs, and LuCI as the browser-facing consumer. (~1645 tokens, l2-source)
- [luci-form-with-uci.md](./chunked-reference/luci-form-with-uci.md): End-to-end guide to creating a LuCI settings page that reads and writes UCI configuration, covering the JavaScript view, form.Map binding, rpcd plugin, ACL file, and the complete request flow from browser to disk. (~3159 tokens, l2-source)
- [luci-uhttpd-https-auth.md](./chunked-reference/luci-uhttpd-https-auth.md): Explains the current OpenWrt login and transport path across LuCI, uhttpd, rpcd sessions, cookies, bearer auth, and HTTPS configuration, including the main edge cases that break deployments. (~1547 tokens, l2-source)
- [minimal-openwrt-package-makefile.md](./chunked-reference/minimal-openwrt-package-makefile.md): Annotated minimal Makefile for packaging a C program in OpenWrt, covering the required variables, Build/Compile, Package/install, and the correct PKG_HASH vs PKG_MD5SUM distinction. (~2639 tokens, l2-source)
- [network-device-model-migrations.md](./chunked-reference/network-device-model-migrations.md): Correct pattern for modern OpenWrt network model migrations, including bridge ifname-to-ports conversion, device-section migration, and current DSA-era helper usage in board defaults. (~1367 tokens, l2-source)
- [openwrt-era-guide.md](./chunked-reference/openwrt-era-guide.md): Reference for identifying which OpenWrt era (legacy, transitional, or current) a given pattern belongs to, so AI tools produce era-appropriate recommendations. (~2653 tokens, l2-source)
- [package-config-bootstrap-pattern.md](./chunked-reference/package-config-bootstrap-pattern.md): Correct pattern for package-owned OpenWrt configuration: ship predictable /etc/config files, use /etc/uci-defaults only for one-shot detection or migration, and keep service application in init or procd logic. (~1022 tokens, l2-source)
- [procd-service-lifecycle.md](./chunked-reference/procd-service-lifecycle.md): Complete guide to writing a procd-managed init script for an OpenWrt service, covering the full lifecycle from start to reload to stop with supervised respawn. (~2130 tokens, l2-source)
- [runtime-device-identity-via-ubus.md](./chunked-reference/runtime-device-identity-via-ubus.md): Canonical pattern for identifying a running OpenWrt device from live system state using ubus call system board instead of reconstructing build tuples or scraping implementation-specific files. (~1320 tokens, l2-source)
- [ubus-observability-pattern.md](./chunked-reference/ubus-observability-pattern.md): Correct pattern for publishing runtime state once through ubus and letting LuCI, CLI tooling, and other services consume that shared state instead of re-deriving it in multiple places. (~1321 tokens, l2-source)
- [uci-read-write-from-ucode.md](./chunked-reference/uci-read-write-from-ucode.md): Concrete guide to reading and writing UCI configuration from a ucode script or rpcd plugin, covering cursor lifecycle, get/set/commit, section iteration, and error handling. (~2648 tokens, l2-source)
- [ucode-rpcd-service-pattern.md](./chunked-reference/ucode-rpcd-service-pattern.md): Correct pattern for exposing OpenWrt backend methods through rpcd using ucode, including method shape, ACL boundaries, structured return values, and graceful degradation when optional state is absent. (~1674 tokens, l2-source)
